channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Project LINK offering final back-to-school health clinics for Hillsborough County students
item.description: Project LINK is offering the final batch of back-to-school health clinics for Hillsborough County students before new school year. Health services are free.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] St. Pete artist Clancy Riehm designs new shirt to celebrate 727 Day this weekend
item.description: Clancy Riehm, known for designing the Tampa Bay Lightning's Black History Month logo, is creating new art for the 727 Day celebration happening this weekend in Pinellas County.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] South Carolina set to open Democratic presidential primary again
item.description: The Democratic Party voted to keep South Carolina first in its 2028 presidential primary calendar, continuing its shift away from Iowa and New Hampshire.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 727 Day: How to score deals and celebrate in St. Pete this weekend
item.description: July 27 is known as 727 Day in St. Pete. It started as a playful celebration of the local area code and has grown into a display of hometown pride.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Meteorologist Greg Dee stops by St. Pete ahead of 727 Day
item.description: Meteorologist Greg Dee gave Friday morning’s forecast live at the Sunken Gardens in St. Petersburg ahead of 727 Day celebrations.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Ford recalls Broncos and Bronco Raptors for fire danger
item.description: Ford is recalling more than 565,000 Broncos and Bronco Raptors because of a wiring defect that can short-circuit and increase the risk of fire.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa man accused of speeding more than 100 mph moments before deadly crash
item.description: A 20-year-old man faces felony vehicular homicide charges after driving over 100 mph and crashing into another car on Florida Avenue, killing the driver, according to Tampa police.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] AAU basketball coach, 5 players arrested after Polk County 7-Eleven theft: PCSO
item.description: Five teenagers visiting the Orlando area for an AAU basketball tournament and their coach were arrested after investigators say the teens stole items from a Polk County convenience store and their coach lied to detectives during the investigation.

item.title: [Tampa Bay Beacon (Pinellas)] Dunedin moves to ban jet ski launches from causeway over safety, seagrass concerns

[BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man accused of going over 100 MPH in Tesla on Florida Ave. arrested after fatal crash: TPD
item.description: The Tampa Police Department (TPD) said it arrested a man involved in a fatal crash on North Florida Avenue on July 2.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump says China, Russia assured him they are not arming Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump appeared to dismiss concerns on Friday that China and Russia are supplying weapons to Iran amid the ongoing conflict with the United States.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] LeBron James joins 76ers, calls it his 'last decision'
item.description: LeBron James announced he will join the Philadelphia 76ers after leaving the Lakers, saying he still loves the game and wants another NBA title.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] LeBron James headed to the Philadelphia 76ers
item.description: LeBron James is signing with the Philadelphia 76ers on a two-year deal, according ESPN's Shams Charania.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] The dangerous side of ‘maxxing’ your health, according to experts
item.description: Online influencers are telling you to take your health to the max with highly specific — and sometimes highly unusual — changes.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Seaplane carrying 11 crashes into an island near Seattle, all aboard are rescued
item.description: A seaplane carrying 11 people crashed and caught fire on the rocky shore of a vacation island north of Seattle, but a swift rescue by boat and air got everyone safely to hospitals.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa Bay Rays stadium development: New district renderings released as city vote stalls plan
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays have revealed plans for a mixed-use development that will surround the proposed stadium on Hillsborough College's Dale Mabry campus.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota approves $51 million rehabilitation of wastewater facility

[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Rare reptiles, found only in South Florida, are now endangered species

[The Florida Channel] 7/24/26 Revenue Estimating Conference: Highway Safety
item.description: 7/24/26 Revenue Estimating Conference: Highway Safety first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/24/26 Revenue Estimating Conference: Highway Safety first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/24/26 Florida Commission on Ethics
item.description: 7/24/26 Florida Commission on Ethics first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/24/26 Florida Commission on Ethics first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Senate eyes Russia sanctions vote, but House recess delays final action
item.description: The Senate may vote next week on the Lindsey O. Graham Sanctions Act targeting Russia — but the House is out until Aug. 31.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Grammy winner Chris Brown pleads guilty in London nightclub attack case
item.description: Chris Brown will be sentenced in October after pleading guilty in a London nightclub violence case tied to a 2023 bottle attack.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida's U.S. Senate fight heating up in two areas: money and message
item.description: In the race to be Florida’s next elected U.S. senator, Republican Sen. Ashley Moody, appointed to replace Marco Rubio, is using the State Department’s new sweeping Cuba report as a political opening.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Teen pleads guilty in deadly Georgia high school shooting
item.description: A teenager has pleaded guilty to all 55 counts in a deadly shooting nearly two years ago at Apalachee High School in Georgia.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Ransom note in Nancy Guthrie kidnapping demanded millions in bitcoin
item.description: New details in the Nancy Guthrie kidnapping case reveal ransom notes demanding bitcoin and suggesting kidnappers had been inside her Arizona home.
